pet_notes: Same Hornato identity: round bright-red tomato mascot, one tiny devil horn on its left side only, cute face, small leaf stem on top, no other horns. Render as readable pixel art with chunky silhouette and limited palette.
style_notes: Cute polished pixel sprite style, limited palette, chunky readable outline, minimal antialiasing, consistent pixel clusters.
style_contract: Pet-safe sprite: compact full-body mascot, readable in a 192x208 cell, clear silhouette, simple face, stable palette/materials, and crisp edges for chroma-key extraction. Style `pixel`: Pixel-art-adjacent digital mascot with a chunky silhouette, simple dark outline, limited palette, flat cel shading, and visible stepped edges. User style notes: Cute polished pixel sprite style, limited palette, chunky readable outline, minimal antialiasing, consistent pixel clusters..
pet_safe_style: Pet-safe sprite: compact full-body mascot, readable in a 192x208 cell, clear silhouette, simple face, stable palette/materials, and crisp edges for chroma-key extraction.
